planSummary: Manual QA gate for PR #20 (feat/saas-05a-packages-ui) — extracts 33 shadcn primitives from apps/dashboard/components/ui into packages/ui (@carekit/ui) workspace. Verifies dashboard boots, primitives resolve, call sites rewrite correctly, and both static and portal/interactive primitives render with full Tailwind styling after the @source scan change.
runSummary: Executed 2026-04-22 (worktree .claude/worktrees/agent-af7d557c on :5113, fresh backend from main on :5101 with CORS allowing :5113). All 9 cases PASS. Auth-protected flows unblocked by running backend from main source (dist on :5100 was stale; worktree backend would not compile because PR #20 branch pre-dates saas-02e).

cases.summary: Dashboard dev server boots from PR branch without compile errors
cases.text:
1. cd worktree/apps/dashboard
2. next dev --turbopack --port 5113
3. Wait for Ready
Expected: '✓ Ready' within 10s, no TS/module-resolution errors against @carekit/ui.

cases.summary: @carekit/ui package structure matches PR description (33 primitives + 2 carve-outs)
cases.text:
1. ls packages/ui/src/primitives/ → 33 files
2. ls apps/dashboard/components/ui/ → 2 files (date-picker.tsx, nationality-select.tsx)
3. grep -rE 'from "@carekit/ui"' apps/dashboard → 227 call sites
Expected: exact counts match the PR.

cases.summary: Login page renders Card/Button/Input/Label primitives from @carekit/ui with full Tailwind styling, RTL, IBM Plex Sans Arabic
cases.text:
1. Open http://localhost:5113/
2. Observe login form
Expected: glass card, rounded button, Arabic labels, RTL layout, correct typography — no unstyled-HTML fallback.

cases.summary: globals.css @source directive scans packages/ui — classes aren't tree-shaken out
cases.text: Inferred from all visual tests: if Tailwind 4 had missed packages/ui, primitives would render as unstyled HTML. Every primitive exercised rendered fully styled.

cases.summary: Login → Home: sidebar, DropdownMenu (Avatar), Tooltip icon buttons render end-to-end
cases.text:
1. Submit admin@carekit-test.com / Admin@1234
2. Redirect to /
Expected: full sidebar (3 nav sections × 17 items), header icon-buttons (dark-mode/Settings/Notifications/Avatar dropdown), Command Palette. Observed all of these. Note: RecentPayments component separately throws a data-shape error (reads .ar on undefined) — unrelated to UI-primitive extraction, pre-existing in main.

cases.summary: /clients destructive flow — AlertDialog opens, deletion fires, table refreshes, StatsGrid updates (97 → 96)
cases.text:
1. /clients → click row-action Delete (icon-only, size-9)
2. AlertDialog opens with description text
3. Click Delete in dialog
Expected: dialog closes, Sonner toast fires (portal), table re-queries, total counter decrements.
Observed: 97 → 96 on StatsGrid + row removed + AlertDialog dismissed. This is the explicit PR gate — AlertDialog + Dialog + portal mounting all pass.

cases.summary: /bookings — date-picker (carve-out) → Popover → Calendar portal renders full Arabic month view
cases.text:
1. /bookings → click 'من' date filter
Expected: Popover opens with Calendar (month header 'أبريل 2026', 35 day cells, prev/next buttons, Today focused).
Observed: full Arabic calendar rendered, Today = الأربعاء 22 أبريل 2026 focused. Proves @carekit/ui Popover+Calendar work AND dashboard carve-out (date-picker.tsx) still composes with them correctly.

cases.summary: /bookings — Tabs + Select comboboxes + icon-only row actions render
cases.text: Observed on /bookings snapshot: 2-tab Tablist (الحجوزات / قائمة الانتظار), 4 status filter buttons, 4 Select comboboxes (types/sources/practitioners/statuses), 2 date-range triggers, 3 icon-only row actions per row. All primitives from @carekit/ui resolve.

cases.summary: /settings — nested Tabs (2 levels) + Input + Button primitives
cases.text:
1. /settings
Expected: top-level Tabs with 8 tabs (General, Booking Policy, Cancellation, Working Hours, Payment, Integrations, ZATCA, Email Templates), plus nested Tabs within General (Email / Locale). Inputs + Save button render.
Observed: all primitives rendered, tab selection state works, nested Tabs are composition-safe. Screenshot: saas-05a-packages-ui-2026-04-22-settings.png
